pretest.stem: 40 stickers are shared equally among 10 friends. How many each?

learn.title: Dividing by 10
learn.content: When you divide by 10, drop the zero from the total. 70 ÷ 10 = 7.

learn.title: Use ×10 Facts
learn.content: If 10 × 6 = 60, then 60 ÷ 10 = 6. Multiplication helps you divide.

learn.title: Skip Count Back
learn.content: Count back by 10s from 50: 50, 40, 30, 20, 10, 0 — 5 jumps. So 50 ÷ 10 = 5.

hints: Think about what divide by 10 means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how divide by 10 works.
